stories.title: Run tree-sitter parsing check on all 104 fixtures
stories.description: Script iterates all 104 fixture.c files under tests/benchmark/cg_bench/, checks both exception-free parsing AND tree.root_node.has_error, stores results in shared memory.
acceptanceCriteria: Script iterates all 104 fixture.c files under tests/benchmark/cg_bench/
Each file is parsed via ethunter.parser.ast_builder.parse_file
Results check both exception-free parsing AND tree.root_node.has_error
Results stored in shared memory with per-fixture PASS/FAIL status
Parsing summary printed to console

stories.title: Parallel LLM analysis - Agent group 1 (fnptr-library + fnptr-varargs)
stories.description: LLM reads and manually analyzes all 21 fixtures in fnptr-library and fnptr-varargs categories.
acceptanceCriteria: All 20 fnptr-library examples analyzed with per-example verdict
All 1 fnptr-varargs example analyzed with per-example verdict
Each analysis includes: syntax check result, comment header verification, forward check, backward check
Results stored in shared memory (key: cg_bench_result_{category})
Output follows the per-fixture analysis template from plan

stories.title: Parallel LLM analysis - Agent group 2 (fnptr-struct)

acceptanceCriteria: All 14 fnptr-struct examples analyzed with per-example verdict

stories.title: Compile final consolidated report
stories.description: Read all agent results from shared memory and compile a single markdown report covering all 104 fixtures organized by category.
acceptanceCriteria: Report file exists at tests/benchmark/cg_bench/correctness-report.md
Report contains all 11 categories
Report covers all 104 fixtures
Report has Summary section with PASS/FAIL counts
Each fixture entry follows the analysis template (syntax, comment, forward, backward, verdict, issues)

stories.title: Verify report quality via spot-check
stories.description: Randomly spot-check 3 fixtures from different categories to verify analysis quality matches actual code and ground truth.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 fixtures spot-checked from 3 different categories (fnptr-callback/example_1, fnptr-struct/example_1, fnptr-only/example_10)
Spot-check confirms report findings match actual code analysis
No major discrepancies found between report and reality
